remember: Students will be able to recall the definition and importance of organizing in business.
Students will be able to list the functions and characteristics of organizing in an enterprise.
Students will be able to explain the need for organizing in business and its impact on efficiency.
understand: Students will be able to understand the role of organizing in achieving business objectives.
Students will be able to explain how organizing helps in reducing conflicts and improving motivation among employees.
Students will be able to describe the different types of organizing and their features.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of organizing to a given business scenario.
Students will be able to design an organizational structure for a small business enterprise.
Students will be able to recommend changes in an organizational structure to improve its efficiency.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the strengths and weaknesses of different organizational structures.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of organizing on the overall performance of an enterprise.
Students will be able to identify the ethical implications of organizing in business.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of organizing and its importance in business.
Describe the functions and characteristics of organizing in an enterprise.
Explain the need for organizing in business and its impact on efficiency.
board_exam_objectives: Define organizing and its importance in business.
Identify the functions and characteristics of organizing.
Explain the need for organizing in business and its impact on efficiency.
